# example/CMakeLists.txt - bstorm_example_next binary
# Portions generated by AI

add_library(bstorm_example_tensors STATIC
  bstorm_example_next_tensors.cc
  bstorm_example_tensor.cc
)

target_include_directories(bstorm_example_tensors PUBLIC
  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}
)

target_link_libraries(bstorm_example_tensors PUBLIC
  bstorm_core_shared
  bstorm_util_litert
)

add_executable(bstorm_example_next
  bstorm_example_next.cc
)

target_link_libraries(bstorm_example_next PRIVATE
  bstorm_example_tensors
  litert_runtime_c_api_shared_lib
  absl::die_if_null
  dl
)
